Disqualifying signals: High volume of invoices (over 15/month); Existing automated solutions in place

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of spreadsheets.

one_liner: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of spreadsheets.

research_summary.notes: Etsy sellers represent a niche market with specific needs for invoice management, making them ideal for this automation.
